'''J'ane Khan'''<ref name="KOTOR" /> was an assassin<ref name="Prima">[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]</ref> for the [[GenoHaradan]], a secret society of [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]]. They wore [[durasteel heavy armor]] and wielded two [[GenoHaradan Poison Blade|GenoHaradan poison blades]]. Khan was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] with [[Color/Legends|light]] skin, brown [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], and black [[Hair/Legends|hair]].<ref name="KOTOR" />

==Behind the scenes==
===Non-canon dark side story===
{{Quote|Brothers of the GenoHaradan: attack!|[[Hulas]]|<ref name="KOTOR" />}}
After [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] met Hulas on [[Manaan/Legends|Manaan]] in [[3956 BBY]] and accepted his proposal to kill the other GenoHaradan leaders, he was soon betrayed by Hulas himself. J'ane Khan, along with other GenoHaradan hunters and assassins fought Revan in the [[Dune Sea/Legends|Dune Sea]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] and were [[Death/Legends|killed]] by him.

J'ane Khan is the only named henchman accompanying Hulas in his confrontation with Revan as well as the only known Human member of the Genoharadan.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
